mapper.select: SELECT t.statistics_time AS alarmtime, t.exception_message AS alarmcontent, t.name AS tableNameCh, t.table_name_en AS tableNameEn, t.sjxjbm AS tableId, t.alarm_level AS levelName FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS t WHERE t.statistics_time >= date(NOW()) - INTERVAL 1 DAY AND t.statistics_time < CURDATE() AND t.table_state = '异常' AND t.name IS NOT NULL
